title: Wrap Assess Stage Payload
description: Schema for the payload field of the wrap workflow assess-state stage output.

base_branch.description: Base branch this feature diverged from

commits_ahead.description: Number of commits ahead of the base branch

has_existing_pr.description: Whether a PR already exists for this branch

pr_url.description: URL of existing PR, or null if none

uncommitted_files.description: Number of files with uncommitted changes (staged + unstaged)

todo_count.description: Number of TODO/FIXME/stub markers in changed files

lint_issues.description: Number of lint issues in changed files

type_errors.description: Number of type checker errors in changed files

files_changed.description: All files changed on branch (committed + uncommitted)
